title: Web-to-Cloud: Compromised Cloud Identity
description: Highlights OCI Audit activity performed by the compromised service identity after instance metadata access. The widget surfaces Object Storage enumeration, object reads, and pre-authenticated request creation.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ('User Name' = 'compromised-svc@corp.example.com' or 'Trace ID' = 'trace_w2c_entry_001') | stats count as CloudActions, distinctcount('Event Type') as UniqueActions, unique('Event Type') as EventTypes, unique('Resource Name') as Resources by 'User Name', 'Source IP', 'Trace ID' | sort -CloudActions

ask_ai_prompts: Which OCI identity was abused after the web entry point?
List the Object Storage actions and resources accessed by the compromised identity.
